argument: While the prosecution asserts that the claim [mkt-01] is valid, I concede that the core of the claim—that the market size is not explicitly defined in the materials provided—can be supported by the evidence snippet indicating that market sizing is not derivable from the deck [deck]. This directly confirms the absence of explicit market size information. However, it is worth noting that the prosecution may have overlooked corroborating details; the $10K MRR suggests some level of market engagement, albeit without clear sizing metrics. Furthermore, the evolving strategy explanation, while not proof, could account for the lack of defined market size in their presentation. I concede that the claim falls short in terms of providing specific market size insights; thus, this part remains genuinely unverified.
